expectations.evidence: Exclusively uses advisor tools, no confusion with vulnerability tools
Uses limit (integer), sort (string), impacting (string) — all correct types
Explicitly uses impacting='true' as string. References 'String-typed booleans -- CRITICAL' section. States 'not a JSON boolean'.
Uses sort='-total_risk' in both the counting call and the data-fetching call
Plans output grouped by severity/category with rule description, affected system count, auto-remediation status, and 20-item cap
